name: HEP MCP
description: MCP-backed HEP capability surface exposed through the host control plane.

capabilities.description: List MCP tool metadata exposed by the configured HEP MCP server.
Call an MCP tool exposed by the configured HEP MCP server.

input_contracts.description: MCP tools/call request params: tool_name + arguments.

output_contracts.description: MCP tools/call result surface including parsed JSON payloads and error metadata.
